name: Men’s Locker Room
description:
The men’s locker room of your local gym in Mannsville—a hellscape in which everything and anything goes. Where guys can be guys and nobody can say shit.

— — — — — — — — — — — — — — — Or: Gym Locker Room sandbox.

This is my first real bot! Leave some feedback in the comments and post your chats. I wanna read them lol 😝
